name: v3 — Deck (dark · Satoshi)
vibe: Dark viewfinder. Real footage, Satoshi, deck-tight. Video-first.
changes: Full redesign off the cream look. Real prototype footage, ambient home demos, 3D scene renders, the OS-line hero, and the live Studio editor.

name: v2 — Investor (verbose)
vibe: Cream + serif, expanded into a full pitch: market, why-now, moat, the ask.
changes: Added five investor sections, real team, reworked demos. Thorough but long and template-ish.

name: v1 — Original (cream · CDN)
vibe: The first concept. Warm cream, Instrument Serif, terracotta accent. Elegant, but the AI-default look.
changes: First build from the v5 HTML: fixed the broken email links, added a waitlist form. Uses the original CDN videos.
